mapper.insert: INSERT INTO concurrent_incident ( party_id, reported_by, detection_source, report_type, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{partyId}, #{reportedBy}, #{detectionSource}, #{reportType}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM concurrent_incident WHERE party_id = #{partyId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM concurrent_incident WHERE party_id = #{partyId} AND status IN ('FIRST_WARNING_SENT', 'DISSOLUTION_SCHEDULED', 'RESOLVED')
mapper.update: UPDATE concurrent_incident SET status = 'FIRST_WARNING_SENT', first_warned_at = #{firstWarnedAt}, host_deadline = #{hostDeadline}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE concurrent_incident SET dissolution_date = #{dissolutionDate}, status = 'DISSOLUTION_SCHEDULED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE concurrent_incident SET status = 'RESOLVED', resolved_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE concurrent_incident SET admin_escalated_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM concurrent_incident WHERE status = 'DISSOLUTION_SCHEDULED' AND web_notified = 0 AND created_at <= #{threshold}
SELECT * FROM concurrent_incident WHERE status = 'DISSOLUTION_SCHEDULED' AND sms_notified = 0 AND created_at <= #{threshold}
SELECT * FROM concurrent_incident WHERE host_deadline IS NOT NULL AND host_deadline < #{now} AND admin_escalated_at IS NULL AND status NOT IN ('RESOLVED', 'PARTY_DISSOLVED')
